title: rubus hirtus var. anoplostachys
intro: Rubus hirtus var. anoplostachys is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry. The leaves and roots of this plant are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. anoplostachys include antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-cancer activities, making it a popular herbal remedy in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried and used as a powder or tincture in traditional medicine.
